title: Document Controller — Oil & Gas (Contract)
description_raw:
NES Fircroft are seeking an experienced Document Controller for a brownfield offshore oil and gas FEED project based in Aberdeen. The role is engaged outside IR35.

The Document Controller will own the project document management function, ensuring all engineering deliverables (mechanical, process, piping, structural) are received, reviewed, transmitted, and archived in accordance with project procedures.

Key responsibilities:
- Maintain the project Electronic Document Management System (EDMS — Aveva NET)
- Issue and track document transmittals between engineering disciplines and the client
- Control all mechanical and process engineering drawings, P&IDs, and data sheets
- Manage document revisions and ensure correct revision levels are circulated
- Support the Lead Document Controller in managing the document register
- Liaise with discipline engineers (mechanical, piping, process) on document status

Profile:
- 3+ years as Document Controller in oil and gas or petrochemical projects
- Proficient in Aveva NET, Documentum, or equivalent EDMS
- Strong understanding of engineering drawing registers and P&ID control
- Experience with offshore FEED or EPC projects preferred

Rate: £280–£320/day outside IR35
Duration: 9 months
Start: 1 August 2026
Location: Aberdeen city centre
